name: aegis-cli
description: Atomus Aegis CLI - Device compliance monitoring for headless Linux servers

scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output bin/aegis-linux-x64
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-arm64 --output bin/aegis-linux-arm64
scripts.package:linux: npm run package:linux-x64 && npm run package:linux-arm64
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output bin/aegis-mac
scripts.package: npm run package:linux && npm run package:mac

author: Atomus Corporation
